Example_EN: Her husband cooks dinner for the family on Sundays.
Example_CN: 她丈夫星期天为全家做晚饭。

Collocation: have access to;internet access;access a file
Example_EN: Students need access to the library after class.
Example_CN: 学生需要在课后使用图书馆。

Example_EN: There has been a strong movement for cleaner air.
Example_CN: 争取更清洁空气的运动声势很大。

Example_EN: Please treat everyone in the group with respect.
Example_CN: 请尊重对待小组里的每一个人。
MemoryTip: treat：怎样对人或请一顿好的。

Example_EN: Can you identify the plant from this photo?
Example_CN: 你能根据这张照片辨认这种植物吗？

Example_EN: The company reported a small loss last quarter.
Example_CN: 公司上季度报告了小额亏损。
MemoryTip: lose 的名词：失去了的那部分。

Example_EN: Shall we meet at the cafe near the park?
Example_CN: 我们要不要在公园旁的咖啡馆见面？
MemoryTip: shall：提建议时常用 Shall we…？

Example_EN: Modern technology makes remote work much easier.
Example_CN: 现代技术让远程工作容易得多。

Example_EN: Students often feel pressure before big exams.
Example_CN: 学生们在大考前常感到压力。

Example_EN: I usually take the bus to work on rainy days.
Example_CN: 下雨天我通常坐公交上班。

Example_EN: Early treatment can stop the illness from spreading.
Example_CN: 早期治疗可以防止疾病扩散。
MemoryTip: treat + ment：对待或医治的过程。

Example_EN: Please help yourself to more fruit on the table.
Example_CN: 桌上还有水果，请自便多拿一些。

Example_EN: The shop could not supply enough fresh milk today.
Example_CN: 这家店今天无法供应足够的鲜牛奶。

Example_EN: They grew up in a quiet village by the river.
Example_CN: 他们在河边一座安静的村庄长大。

Example_EN: This guidebook is worth reading before you travel.
Example_CN: 出行前这本指南值得一读。

Example_EN: It feels natural to greet neighbours in this town.
Example_CN: 在这座小镇里跟邻居打招呼很自然。

Example_EN: Children need ways to express their feelings safely.
Example_CN: 孩子们需要安全表达情感的方式。

Example_EN: These results indicate that the method works well.
Example_CN: 这些结果表明该方法效果良好。

Example_EN: Will you attend the online workshop on Friday?
Example_CN: 你周五会参加那场线上研讨吗？

Example_EN: My brother teaches primary school in another town.
Example_CN: 我哥哥在另一座小镇教小学。

Example_EN: Education is a valuable investment in your future.
Example_CN: 教育是对未来的宝贵投资。
MemoryTip: invest + ment：把资源放进去期待回报。

Example_EN: Our team needs one more point to score a win.
Example_CN: 我们队再得一分就能赢。

Example_EN: Can you help organize the chairs for the talk?
Example_CN: 你能帮忙布置讲座用的椅子吗？
MemoryTip: organ + ize：把零件组成有序整体。

Example_EN: We took a short trip to the countryside last week.
Example_CN: 上周我们去乡下做了一次短途旅行。

Example_EN: This problem is beyond what one person can fix alone.
Example_CN: 这个问题超出了单个人独自能解决的范围。

Collocation: go to sleep;deep sleep;not sleep well
Example_EN: I did not sleep well because of the loud traffic.
Example_CN: 因为交通嘈杂，我睡得不好。

Example_EN: They cook fresh fish from the market every Friday.
Example_CN: 他们每周五用市场买来的鲜鱼做饭。

Collocation: keep a promise;promise to;break a promise
Example_EN: Please keep your promise to call when you arrive.
Example_CN: 请信守承诺，到达后打电话。

Example_EN: She has great potential as a future team leader.
Example_CN: 她作为未来团队领导有很大潜力。

Example_EN: After lunch he hardly had enough energy to work.
Example_CN: 午饭后他几乎没有足够精力工作。

Example_EN: Call me if you have any trouble finding the place.
Example_CN: 如果找地方有麻烦就给我打电话。

Example_EN: What is your opinion in relation to this plan?
Example_CN: 关于这个计划你怎么看？
MemoryTip: relate 的名词：彼此之间的联系。

Example_EN: Please keep in touch after you move abroad.
Example_CN: 出国后请保持联系。

Collocation: open a file;file a complaint;in single file
Example_EN: Please save the file before you close the laptop.
Example_CN: 合上笔记本前请先保存文件。
MemoryTip: file：夹在一起的文档或整列行走。

Collocation: in the middle;middle class;middle of nowhere
Example_EN: Please sit in the middle of the front row.
Example_CN: 请坐在前排中间。

Example_EN: We met at a quiet bar near the hotel.
Example_CN: 我们在酒店附近一家安静的酒吧见面。
MemoryTip: bar：横挡、酒吧，也指禁止进入。

Collocation: suffer from;suffer a loss;suffer in silence
Example_EN: Many drivers suffer from back pain after long trips.
Example_CN: 许多司机长途驾驶后会背痛。

Example_EN: Our study strategy includes short daily reviews.
Example_CN: 我们的学习策略包括每天短复习。

Example_EN: Take a deep breath before you start speaking.
Example_CN: 开始说话前先深呼吸一下。

Example_EN: Everyone came to the picnic except Tom.
Example_CN: 除了汤姆，大家都来野餐了。
MemoryTip: ex + cept：把某个拿出来不算。

Example_EN: Please clean the kitchen after you cook dinner.
Example_CN: 做完晚饭后请把厨房打扫干净。

Example_EN: I tend to drink tea rather than coffee.
Example_CN: 我倾向于喝茶而不是咖啡。

Example_EN: Please book your tickets at least a week in advance.
Example_CN: 请至少提前一周订票。

Example_EN: Please fill in your name at the top of the form.
Example_CN: 请在表格顶部填写你的姓名。

Example_EN: She will star in a new stage play this autumn.
Example_CN: 她将出演今秋一部新舞台剧。
MemoryTip: star：天上发光，地上也指明星。

Example_EN: A strong network of friends can help in hard times.
Example_CN: 强大的朋友网络能在困难时提供帮助。
MemoryTip: net + work：结成一张相互连接的网。

Example_EN: Generally speaking, mornings are quieter here.
Example_CN: 一般来说，这里的早晨更安静。

Example_EN: The factory is back in operation after repairs.
Example_CN: 工厂维修后已恢复运转。
MemoryTip: operate 的名词：动手做的一整套。

Example_EN: The colours of the curtains match the sofa well.
Example_CN: 窗帘的颜色和沙发很搭配。
MemoryTip: match：对得上的一对，或一场赛。

Example_EN: Try to avoid busy roads during the morning rush.
Example_CN: 尽量避开早高峰拥堵路段。

Example_EN: Please take a seat while we prepare your order.
Example_CN: 我们准备订单时请先坐下。

Example_EN: Please do not throw rubbish into the river.
Example_CN: 请不要往河里扔垃圾。
MemoryTip: throw：手臂一挥让东西飞出去。

Example_EN: My first task today is to reply to customer emails.
Example_CN: 我今天的第一项任务是回复客户邮件。
MemoryTip: task：被分派要完成的一件事。

Example_EN: Traffic is back to normal after the roadworks.
Example_CN: 道路施工结束后交通恢复了正常。

Collocation: achieve a goal;goal of;score a goal
Example_EN: My goal this year is to swim twice a week.
Example_CN: 我今年的目标是每周游泳两次。

Example_EN: People often associate the smell of coffee with mornings.
Example_CN: 人们常把咖啡香与早晨联系起来。

Example_EN: The sky looked bright blue after the storm.
Example_CN: 暴风雨后天空显得湛蓝。
MemoryTip: blue：海天的颜色，也可指心情低落。

Example_EN: Try to keep a positive attitude during hard times.
Example_CN: 困难时期尽量保持积极态度。

Example_EN: Buying used books is a cheaper option for students.
Example_CN: 买二手书对学生来说是更便宜的选择。

Example_EN: Please put the fragile cups in a strong box.
Example_CN: 请把易碎杯子放进结实的盒子里。

Example_EN: There is a huge difference between the two plans.
Example_CN: 这两个计划之间有巨大差异。

Collocation: send a message;text message;leave a message
Example_EN: I left a message on your phone this morning.
Example_CN: 我今早在你手机上留了言。

Example_EN: Some fruits are expensive; mangoes, for instance.
Example_CN: 有些水果很贵，比如芒果。

Example_EN: I like the simple style of this cafe's design.
Example_CN: 我喜欢这家咖啡馆简约的设计风格。
MemoryTip: style：做事或打扮的独特样子。

Example_EN: Please refer to page ten for more details.
Example_CN: 更多细节请参阅第十页。

Example_EN: Wear a coat or you may catch a cold tonight.
Example_CN: 穿件外套，不然今晚可能会感冒。

Collocation: push the door;push for;give a push
Example_EN: Please push the door instead of pulling it.
Example_CN: 请推门，不要拉门。

Example_EN: Sales rose in the first quarter of the year.
Example_CN: 今年第一季度销售额上升了。

Example_EN: Do not assume that everyone knows the same rules.
Example_CN: 不要假定每个人都知道同样的规则。
MemoryTip: as + sume：先拿过来当作事实。

Collocation: baby girl;baby food;cry like a baby
Example_EN: The baby fell asleep in the warm afternoon light.
Example_CN: 婴儿在温暖的午后阳光里睡着了。

Example_EN: The open day was a successful event for the school.
Example_CN: 开放日对学校来说是一次成功活动。

Example_EN: Children love to sing along with popular tunes.
Example_CN: 孩子们喜欢跟着流行歌曲一起唱。

Example_EN: I doubt that we can finish before six o'clock.
Example_CN: 我怀疑我们六点前能否做完。

Example_EN: She won first prize in the writing competition.
Example_CN: 她在写作比赛中获得一等奖。
MemoryTip: compete 的名词：较量谁更好。

Example_EN: In theory the plan looks fine, but practice is harder.
Example_CN: 理论上计划不错，但实践更难。

Example_EN: I propose that we share the cost of the gift.
Example_CN: 我提议我们共同分担礼物费用。

Example_EN: Please keep this guide for future reference.
Example_CN: 请保留这份指南以备日后参考。
MemoryTip: refer 的名词：可供回查的材料。

Example_EN: They had a short argument about cleaning duties.
Example_CN: 他们为打扫分工短暂争吵了一下。
MemoryTip: argue 的名词：争论的话或理据。

Example_EN: This film is not suitable for young children; adults only.
Example_CN: 这部电影不适合幼儿，仅限成人。

Example_EN: We will fly to London early on Saturday morning.
Example_CN: 我们将在周六清晨飞往伦敦。
MemoryTip: fly：翅膀离地，或开飞机出行。

Example_EN: Please bring all travel documents to the airport.
Example_CN: 请把所有旅行证件带到机场。

Example_EN: There is a clear pattern in these test results.
Example_CN: 这些测试结果中有清晰的规律。

Example_EN: Please submit your application before the deadline.
Example_CN: 请在截止日期前提交申请。
MemoryTip: apply 的名词：递交或实际用途。

Example_EN: The soup is still too hot to drink safely.
Example_CN: 汤还太烫，不能安全喝。

Example_EN: He was obviously tired after the long flight.
Example_CN: 长途飞行后他显然很累。
MemoryTip: obvious + ly：摆在面上人人可见。

Example_EN: The instructions are still unclear to several students.
Example_CN: 这些说明对几个学生来说仍不清楚。

Example_EN: Could we have the bill, please?
Example_CN: 请给我们账单好吗？
MemoryTip: bill：该付钱的单子，也指法案。

Example_EN: I need to search for a quieter cafe nearby.
Example_CN: 我需要搜索附近更安静的咖啡馆。

Example_EN: Please keep raw meat separate from fresh fruit.
Example_CN: 请把生肉与新鲜水果分开存放。

Example_EN: The library sits in a central part of the city.
Example_CN: 图书馆位于城市的中心区域。

Example_EN: She hopes to build a career in digital design.
Example_CN: 她希望在数字设计领域发展职业。

Example_EN: It might rain; anyway, we should take umbrellas.
Example_CN: 可能会下雨；无论如何，我们该带伞。
MemoryTip: any + way：不论走哪条路都行。

Example_EN: He gave a short speech at the school assembly.
Example_CN: 他在学校集会上做了简短演讲。

Example_EN: Their dog waits by the door every evening.
Example_CN: 他们的狗每天傍晚都在门口等着。

Example_EN: A police officer helped us find the right platform.
Example_CN: 一名警察帮我们找到了正确的站台。

Collocation: throughout the year;throughout history;throughout the day
Example_EN: Wi-Fi is available throughout the whole building.
Example_CN: 整栋楼都有无线网络。
MemoryTip: through + out：从头穿到尾、处处都是。

Example_EN: Please add a little oil to the pan before frying.
Example_CN: 煎炸前请在锅里加一点油。

Example_EN: She bought a blue dress for the summer party.
Example_CN: 她为夏季派对买了一条蓝裙子。

Example_EN: The small shop began to make a profit last year.
Example_CN: 这家小店去年开始盈利。
MemoryTip: pro + fit：事情做得合身，赚到了。

Example_EN: Can you guess how many books are on the shelf?
Example_CN: 你能猜出架子上有多少本书吗？
